title: Claude Fable 5 is here!
summary: A YouTube review of Claude Fable 5 (also called Claude Mythos 5) covering various capabilities including ray tracing, 3D reconstruction, music composition, and chemistry tasks. The video compares Fable 5 performance against GPT 5.5 and discusses model specifications.
writeup: AI Search reviews Claude Fable 5 (also called Claude Mythos 5), walking through its performance on ray tracing, 3D reconstruction, music composition, and chemistry tasks. The video benchmarks Fable 5 against GPT 5.5 and reviews the model's specifications. Video generation is also among the capabilities covered.
